description.zh-Hans: 通过将Alpha通道或亮度解释为高度图，使用Sobel算子计算法线并应用Blinn-Phong着色，产生斜面/浮雕效果。创建3D凸起或凹陷外观。
description.en: Applies a bevel/emboss effect by interpreting alpha or luminance as a heightmap, computing normals via Sobel, and applying Blinn-Phong shading. Creates a 3D raised or inset appearance.

triggers.zh-Hans: 斜面, 浮雕, 凸起, 凹陷, 3D边缘

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 为像素艺术图标应用斜面效果，产生3D凸起外观。
exampleUsage.en: Apply a bevel effect to a pixel art icon for a 3D raised appearance.
